titles.en: The Description of the Ablution of the Messenger of Allah {saws}

titles.ar: باب - صفة وضوء رسول الله صلى الله عليه وآله
titles.en: The Description of the Ablution of the Messenger of Allah {saws}

segments: 74 - قَالَ أَبُو جَعْفَرٍ اَلْبَاقِرُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: «أَ لاَ أَحْكِي لَكُمْ وُضُوءَ رَسُولِ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ » فَقِيلَ لَهُ بَلَى فَدَعَا بِقَعْبٍ فِيهِ شَيْءٌ مِنْ مَاءٍ فَوَضَعَهُ بَيْنَ يَدَيْهِ ثُمَّ حَسَرَ عَنْ ذِرَاعَيْهِ ثُمَّ غَمَسَ فِيهِ كَفَّهُ اَلْيُمْنَى ثُمَّ قَالَ «هَذَا إِذَا كَانَتِ اَلْكَفُّ طَاهِرَةً» ثُمَّ غَرَفَ مِلْأَهَا مَاءً ثُمَّ وَضَعَهُ عَلَى جَبْهَتِهِ وَقَالَ « بِسْمِ اَللَّهِ » وَ سَيَّلَهُ عَلَى أَطْرَافِ لِحْيَتِهِ ثُمَّ أَمَرَّ يَدَهُ عَلَى وَجْهِهِ وَ ظَاهِرِ جَبِينَيْهِ مَرَّةً وَاحِدَةً ثُمَّ غَمَسَ يَدَهُ اَلْيُسْرَى فَغَرَفَ بِهَا مِلْأَهَا ثُمَّ وَضَعَهُ عَلَى مِرْفَقِهِ اَلْيُمْنَى فَأَمَرَّ كَفَّهُ عَلَى سَاعِدِهِ حَتَّى جَرَى اَلْمَاءُ عَلَى أَطْرَافِ أَصَابِعِهِ ثُمَّ غَرَفَ بِيَمِينِهِ مِلْأَهَا فَوَضَعَهُ عَلَى مِرْفَقِهِ اَلْأَيْسَرِ فَأَمَرَّ كَفَّهُ عَلَى سَاعِدِهِ حَتَّى جَرَى اَلْمَاءُ عَلَى أَطْرَافِ أَصَابِعِهِ وَ مَسَحَ عَلَى مُقَدَّمِ رَأْسِهِ وَ ظَهْرِ قَدَمَيْهِ بِبِلَّةِ بَقِيَّةِ مَائِهِ.
arabic.text: 74 - قَالَ أَبُو جَعْفَرٍ اَلْبَاقِرُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: «أَ لاَ أَحْكِي لَكُمْ وُضُوءَ رَسُولِ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ » فَقِيلَ لَهُ بَلَى فَدَعَا بِقَعْبٍ فِيهِ شَيْءٌ مِنْ مَاءٍ فَوَضَعَهُ بَيْنَ يَدَيْهِ ثُمَّ حَسَرَ عَنْ ذِرَاعَيْهِ ثُمَّ غَمَسَ فِيهِ كَفَّهُ اَلْيُمْنَى ثُمَّ قَالَ «هَذَا إِذَا كَانَتِ اَلْكَفُّ طَاهِرَةً» ثُمَّ غَرَفَ مِلْأَهَا مَاءً ثُمَّ وَضَعَهُ عَلَى جَبْهَتِهِ وَقَالَ « بِسْمِ اَللَّهِ » وَ سَيَّلَهُ عَلَى أَطْرَافِ لِحْيَتِهِ ثُمَّ أَمَرَّ يَدَهُ عَلَى وَجْهِهِ وَ ظَاهِرِ جَبِينَيْهِ مَرَّةً وَاحِدَةً ثُمَّ غَمَسَ يَدَهُ اَلْيُسْرَى فَغَرَفَ بِهَا مِلْأَهَا ثُمَّ وَضَعَهُ عَلَى مِرْفَقِهِ اَلْيُمْنَى فَأَمَرَّ كَفَّهُ عَلَى سَاعِدِهِ حَتَّى جَرَى اَلْمَاءُ عَلَى أَطْرَافِ أَصَابِعِهِ ثُمَّ غَرَفَ بِيَمِينِهِ مِلْأَهَا فَوَضَعَهُ عَلَى مِرْفَقِهِ اَلْأَيْسَرِ فَأَمَرَّ كَفَّهُ عَلَى سَاعِدِهِ حَتَّى جَرَى اَلْمَاءُ عَلَى أَطْرَافِ أَصَابِعِهِ وَ مَسَحَ عَلَى مُقَدَّمِ رَأْسِهِ وَ ظَهْرِ قَدَمَيْهِ بِبِلَّةِ بَقِيَّةِ مَائِهِ.

segments:
Hadith.74 - Imam Muhammad ibn Ali Al-Baqir (as) said:
"Shall I not describe the ablution of the Messenger of Allah (sw) to you?"
They replied: "Yes."
He then called for a bowl containing some water and placed it in front of him.
He rolled up his sleeves, dipped his right hand into the water, and said:
"This is if the hand is pure."
He then scooped a full handful of water, placed it on his forehead, "In the name of Allah (swt)," allowing the water to flow over the edges of his beard.
Then he passed his hand over his face and the front of his temples once.
He dipped his left hand into the water, scooped a full handful, and placed it on his right elbow, running his hand along his forearm until the water flowed over the tips of his fingers.
He then scooped with his right hand again and placed it on his left elbow, running his hand along his forearm until the water flowed over the tips of his fingers.
He then wiped the front of his head and the tops of his feet with the leftover moisture from the water.
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.74 - Imam Muhammad ibn Ali Al-Baqir (as) said:
"Shall I not describe the ablution of the Messenger of Allah (sw) to you?"
They replied: "Yes."
He then called for a bowl containing some water and placed it in front of him.
He rolled up his sleeves, dipped his right hand into the water, and said:
"This is if the hand is pure."
He then scooped a full handful of water, placed it on his forehead, "In the name of Allah (swt)," allowing the water to flow over the edges of his beard.
Then he passed his hand over his face and the front of his temples once.
He dipped his left hand into the water, scooped a full handful, and placed it on his right elbow, running his hand along his forearm until the water flowed over the tips of his fingers.
He then scooped with his right hand again and placed it on his left elbow, running his hand along his forearm until the water flowed over the tips of his fingers.
He then wiped the front of his head and the tops of his feet with the leftover moisture from the water.

titles.ar: باب - صفة وضوء رسول الله صلى الله عليه وآله
titles.en: The Description of the Ablution of the Messenger of Allah {saws}

segments: 75 - وَ رُوِيَ: «أَنَّ رَسُولَ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ تَوَضَّأَ ثُمَّ مَسَحَ عَلَى نَعْلَيْهِ فَقَالَ لَهُ اَلْمُغِيرَةُ أَ نَسِيتَ يَا رَسُولَ اَللَّهِ قَالَ «بَلْ أَنْتَ نَسِيتَ هَكَذَا أَمَرَنِي رَبِّي».
arabic.text: 75 - وَ رُوِيَ: «أَنَّ رَسُولَ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ تَوَضَّأَ ثُمَّ مَسَحَ عَلَى نَعْلَيْهِ فَقَالَ لَهُ اَلْمُغِيرَةُ أَ نَسِيتَ يَا رَسُولَ اَللَّهِ قَالَ «بَلْ أَنْتَ نَسِيتَ هَكَذَا أَمَرَنِي رَبِّي».

segments:
Hadith.75 - It was narrated that the Messenger of Allah (sw) performed wudu and then wiped over his sandals.
Al-Mughirah said to him: "Did you forget, O’ Messenger of Allah (sw)?"
He (sw) replied: "No, rather it is you who has forgotten. This is how my Lord (azj) commanded me."
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.75 - It was narrated that the Messenger of Allah (sw) performed wudu and then wiped over his sandals.
Al-Mughirah said to him: "Did you forget, O’ Messenger of Allah (sw)?"
He (sw) replied: "No, rather it is you who has forgotten. This is how my Lord (azj) commanded me."

narratorChain.raw: 75 - وَ رُوِيَ: «أَنَّ رَسُولَ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ تَوَضَّأَ ثُمَّ مَسَحَ عَلَى نَعْلَيْهِ فَقَالَ

parts.text: رُوِيَ: «أَنَّ رَسُولَ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ
آلِهِ تَوَضَّأَ ثُمَّ مَسَحَ عَلَى نَعْلَيْهِ

titles.ar: باب - صفة وضوء رسول الله صلى الله عليه وآله
titles.en: The Description of the Ablution of the Messenger of Allah {saws}

segments: 76 - وَقَالَ اَلصَّادِقُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: «وَ اَللَّهِ مَا كَانَ وُضُوءُ رَسُولِ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ إِلاَّ مَرَّةً مَرَّةً وَ تَوَضَّأَ اَلنَّبِيُّ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ مَرَّةً مَرَّةً» فَقَالَ «هَذَا وُضُوءٌ لاَ يَقْبَلُ اَللَّهُ اَلصَّلاَةَ إِلاَّ بِهِ.
arabic.text: 76 - وَقَالَ اَلصَّادِقُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: «وَ اَللَّهِ مَا كَانَ وُضُوءُ رَسُولِ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ إِلاَّ مَرَّةً مَرَّةً وَ تَوَضَّأَ اَلنَّبِيُّ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ مَرَّةً مَرَّةً» فَقَالَ «هَذَا وُضُوءٌ لاَ يَقْبَلُ اَللَّهُ اَلصَّلاَةَ إِلاَّ بِهِ.

segments:
Hadith.76 - Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) said:
"By Allah (swt), the ablution of the Messenger of Allah (sw) was performed only once for each part, and The Prophet (sw) performed wudu once for each action."
Imam (as) said: "This is an ablution that Allah (swt) does not accept the prayer without it”.
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.76 - Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) said:
"By Allah (swt), the ablution of the Messenger of Allah (sw) was performed only once for each part, and The Prophet (sw) performed wudu once for each action."
Imam (as) said: "This is an ablution that Allah (swt) does not accept the prayer without it”.

narratorChain.raw: 76 - وَقَالَ اَلصَّادِقُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: «وَ اَللَّهِ مَا كَانَ وُضُوءُ رَسُولِ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ إِلاَّ مَرَّةً مَرَّةً وَ تَوَضَّأَ اَلنَّبِيُّ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ مَرَّةً مَرَّةً» فَقَالَ

parts.text: وَقَالَ اَلصَّادِقُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: «وَ اَللَّهِ مَا كَانَ وُضُوءُ رَسُولِ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ

titles.ar: باب - صفة وضوء رسول الله صلى الله عليه وآله
titles.en: The Description of the Ablution of the Messenger of Allah {saws}

segments: : «فَرَضَ اَللَّهُ اَلْوُضُوءَ وَاحِدَةً وَاحِدَةً وَ وَضَعَ رَسُولُ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ لِلنَّاسِ اِثْنَتَيْنِ اِثْنَتَيْنِ.
arabic.text: : «فَرَضَ اَللَّهُ اَلْوُضُوءَ وَاحِدَةً وَاحِدَةً وَ وَضَعَ رَسُولُ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ لِلنَّاسِ اِثْنَتَيْنِ اِثْنَتَيْنِ.

segments:
Hadith.77 - In a broken chain of narration, Abu Ja'far al-Ahwal recounts from those who narrated from Abu Abdullah (as) who said:
"Allah (swt) made ablution (wudu) obligatory once for each action, but the Messenger of Allah (sw) prescribed it twice for the people”.
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.77 - In a broken chain of narration, Abu Ja'far al-Ahwal recounts from those who narrated from Abu Abdullah (as) who said:
"Allah (swt) made ablution (wudu) obligatory once for each action, but the Messenger of Allah (sw) prescribed it twice for the people”.

narratorChain.raw: 77 - بِإِسْنَادٍ مُنْقَطِعٍ يَرْوِيهِ أَبُو جَعْفَرٍ اَلْأَحْوَلُ ذَكَرَهُ عَمَّنْ رَوَاهُ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ

parts.text: بِإِسْنَادٍ مُنْقَطِعٍ يَرْوِيهِ أَبُو جَعْفَرٍ اَلْأَحْوَلُ ذَكَرَهُ عَمَّنْ رَوَاهُ

titles.ar: باب - صفة وضوء رسول الله صلى الله عليه وآله
titles.en: The Description of the Ablution of the Messenger of Allah {saws}

segments: 78 - وَ قَدْ رُوِيَ: «أَنَّ اَلْوُضُوءَ حَدٌّ مِنْ حُدُودِ اَللَّهِ لِيَعْلَمَ اَللَّهُ مَنْ يُطِيعُهُ وَ مَنْ يَعْصِيهِ وَ أَنَّ اَلْمُؤْمِنَ لاَ يُنَجِّسُهُ شَيْءٌ وَ إِنَّمَا يَكْفِيهِ مِثْلُ اَلدَّهْنِ.
arabic.text: 78 - وَ قَدْ رُوِيَ: «أَنَّ اَلْوُضُوءَ حَدٌّ مِنْ حُدُودِ اَللَّهِ لِيَعْلَمَ اَللَّهُ مَنْ يُطِيعُهُ وَ مَنْ يَعْصِيهِ وَ أَنَّ اَلْمُؤْمِنَ لاَ يُنَجِّسُهُ شَيْءٌ وَ إِنَّمَا يَكْفِيهِ مِثْلُ اَلدَّهْنِ.

segments:
Hadith.78 - It has been narrated (by Imam Muhammad ibn Ali Al-Baqir (as) ) that:
"Ablution is a limit set by Allah (swt) so that He may know who obeys Him and who disobeys Him. And a believer is not made impure by anything ; rather, something like oil is sufficient for him”.
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.78 - It has been narrated (by Imam Muhammad ibn Ali Al-Baqir (as) ) that:
"Ablution is a limit set by Allah (swt) so that He may know who obeys Him and who disobeys Him. And a believer is not made impure by anything ; rather, something like oil is sufficient for him”.

titles.ar: باب - صفة وضوء رسول الله صلى الله عليه وآله
titles.en: The Description of the Ablution of the Messenger of Allah {saws}

segments: 79 - وَقَالَ اَلصَّادِقُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: «مَنْ تَعَدَّى فِي وُضُوئِهِ كَانَ كَنَاقِضِهِ.
arabic.text: 79 - وَقَالَ اَلصَّادِقُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: «مَنْ تَعَدَّى فِي وُضُوئِهِ كَانَ كَنَاقِضِهِ.

segments:
Hadith.79 - Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) said:
"Whoever exceeds the prescribed limits in his ablution (wudu) is like one who nullifies it”.
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.79 - Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) said:
"Whoever exceeds the prescribed limits in his ablution (wudu) is like one who nullifies it”.

titles.ar: باب - صفة وضوء رسول الله صلى الله عليه وآله
titles.en: The Description of the Ablution of the Messenger of Allah {saws}

segments: ذَلِكَ حَدِيثٌ آخَرُ بِإِسْنَادٍ مُنْقَطِعٍ رَوَاهُ عَمْرُو بْنُ أَبِي اَلْمِقْدَامِ قَالَ حَدَّثَنِي مَنْ سَمِعَ أَبَا عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ يَقُولُ: «إِنِّي لَأَعْجَبُ مِمَّنْ يَرْغَبُ أَنْ يَتَوَضَّأَ اِثْنَتَيْنِ اِثْنَتَيْنِ وَ قَدْ تَوَضَّأَ رَسُولُ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ اِثْنَتَيْنِ اِثْنَتَيْنِ فَإِنَّ اَلنَّبِيَّ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ كَانَ يُجَدِّدُ اَلْوُضُوءَ لِكُلِّ فَرِيضَةٍ وَ لِكُلِّ صَلاَةٍ.
arabic.text: ذَلِكَ حَدِيثٌ آخَرُ بِإِسْنَادٍ مُنْقَطِعٍ رَوَاهُ عَمْرُو بْنُ أَبِي اَلْمِقْدَامِ قَالَ حَدَّثَنِي مَنْ سَمِعَ أَبَا عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ يَقُولُ: «إِنِّي لَأَعْجَبُ مِمَّنْ يَرْغَبُ أَنْ يَتَوَضَّأَ اِثْنَتَيْنِ اِثْنَتَيْنِ وَ قَدْ تَوَضَّأَ رَسُولُ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ اِثْنَتَيْنِ اِثْنَتَيْنِ فَإِنَّ اَلنَّبِيَّ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ كَانَ يُجَدِّدُ اَلْوُضُوءَ لِكُلِّ فَرِيضَةٍ وَ لِكُلِّ صَلاَةٍ.

segments: Hadith.80 - In another narration with a broken chain, Amr ibn Abi al-Miqdam said: "I was informed by someone who heard Abu Abdullah (as) say: 'I am amazed at those who prefer to perform wudu twice, while the Messenger of Allah (sw) performed it twice. The Prophet (sw) would renew his ablution for each obligatory prayer and each prayer.'"
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text: Hadith.80 - In another narration with a broken chain, Amr ibn Abi al-Miqdam said: "I was informed by someone who heard Abu Abdullah (as) say: 'I am amazed at those who prefer to perform wudu twice, while the Messenger of Allah (sw) performed it twice. The Prophet (sw) would renew his ablution for each obligatory prayer and each prayer.'"

narratorChain.raw: وَفِي ذَٰلِكَ حَدِيثٌ آخَرُ بِإِسْنَادٍ مُنْقَطِعٍ رَوَاهُ عَمْرُو بْنُ أَبِي الْمِقْدَامِ قَالَ حَدَّثَنِي مَنْ سَمِعَ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ السَّلَامُ يَقُولُ:

parts.text: َفِي ذَٰلِكَ حَدِيثٌ آخَرُ بِإِسْنَادٍ مُنْقَطِعٍ رَوَاهُ عَمْرُو بْنُ أَبِي الْمِقْدَامِ قَالَ حَدَّثَنِي مَنْ سَمِعَ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ السَّلَامُ يَقُولُ:

titles.ar: باب - صفة وضوء رسول الله صلى الله عليه وآله
titles.en: The Description of the Ablution of the Messenger of Allah {saws}

segments: 81 - وَ رُوِيَ: «أَنَّ تَجْدِيدَ اَلْوُضُوءِ لِصَلاَةِ اَلْعِشَاءِ يَمْحُو لاَ وَ اَللَّهِ وَ بَلَى وَ اَللَّهِ.
arabic.text: 81 - وَ رُوِيَ: «أَنَّ تَجْدِيدَ اَلْوُضُوءِ لِصَلاَةِ اَلْعِشَاءِ يَمْحُو لاَ وَ اَللَّهِ وَ بَلَى وَ اَللَّهِ.

segments:
Hadith.81 – (Imam Ali ibn Musa Ar-Ridha (as) ) narrated that:
"Renewing wudu for the Isha prayer erases sins, by Allah (swt), indeed it does, by Allah (swt)."
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.81 – (Imam Ali ibn Musa Ar-Ridha (as) ) narrated that:
"Renewing wudu for the Isha prayer erases sins, by Allah (swt), indeed it does, by Allah (swt)."

titles.ar: باب - صفة وضوء رسول الله صلى الله عليه وآله
titles.en: The Description of the Ablution of the Messenger of Allah {saws}

segments: 82 - وَ رُوِيَ فِي خَبَرٍ آخَرَ: «أَنَّ اَلْوُضُوءَ عَلَى اَلْوُضُوءِ نُورٌ عَلَى نُورٍ وَ مَنْ جَدَّدَ وُضُوءَهُ مِنْ غَيْرِ حَدَثٍ آخَرَ جَدَّدَ اَللَّهُ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ تَوْبَتَهُ مِنْ غَيْرِ اِسْتِغْفَارٍ.
arabic.text: 82 - وَ رُوِيَ فِي خَبَرٍ آخَرَ: «أَنَّ اَلْوُضُوءَ عَلَى اَلْوُضُوءِ نُورٌ عَلَى نُورٍ وَ مَنْ جَدَّدَ وُضُوءَهُ مِنْ غَيْرِ حَدَثٍ آخَرَ جَدَّدَ اَللَّهُ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ تَوْبَتَهُ مِنْ غَيْرِ اِسْتِغْفَارٍ.

segments:
Hadith.82 - (Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) ) narrated in another report that:
"Ablution (wudu) upon wudu is light upon light, and whoever renews their wudu without having incurred a new state of impurity, Allah (swt), Mighty and Majestic, renews their repentance without requiring further forgiveness."
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.82 - (Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) ) narrated in another report that:
"Ablution (wudu) upon wudu is light upon light, and whoever renews their wudu without having incurred a new state of impurity, Allah (swt), Mighty and Majestic, renews their repentance without requiring further forgiveness."
